title: juncus subtilis
intro: Juncus subtilis, also known as the small rush or dwarf rush, is a species of flowering plant in the family Juncaceae, characterized by its delicate stems and small, green leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. Consuming Juncus subtilis has been associated with several health benefits, including improved cardiovascular health and reduced risk of certain diseases, as well as antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Juncus subtilis can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health-promoting properties.
